product_overview: LokBhasha is a glossary-aware document localization workflow that converts Marathi government documents into canonical English via Lingo.dev and optionally localizes that English into Indian target languages while surfacing glossary and quality context.
core_goals: Provide accurate, glossary-aware canonical English renderings of Marathi government documents.
Enable deterministic, on-demand localization into selected Indian languages without replacing canonical English.
Surface glossary provenance, Lingo.dev setup, and quality metadata to support operator and trust requirements.
Support reliable PDF upload and pasted-text inputs with browser-side PDF preparation and deterministic built-in samples for testing.

features.name: Live sample analysis
features.description: Run a curated Marathi sample through the live analysis flow to produce canonical English and surface glossary/Lingo provenance.
user_flows: POST /analyze with { sample_id: "live" } -> Receive 200 with result { id, source_marathi, canonical_english, glossary_hits, lingo_provenance }
POST /analyze with { sample_id: "live" } -> Receive 500 or 502 when upstream Lingo.dev fails, with error payload indicating transient localization error

features.name: PDF sample and upload analysis
features.description: Prepare a built-in or user-uploaded PDF in the browser, then submit prepared text to the analyze API to get glossary-aware canonical English.
user_flows: POST /analyze with { prepared_text: "<extracted text>", source_type: "pdf", filename: "sample.pdf" } -> Receive 200 with result { id, source_marathi, canonical_english, glossary_hits }
POST /analyze with { prepared_text: "", source_type: "pdf" } -> Receive 400 with validation error 'no_text_extracted' when browser-side PDF prep fails or file is not a valid PDF

features.name: Pasted Marathi text analysis
features.description: Accept pasted Marathi text and submit it to the analyze API to receive side-by-side Marathi and canonical English results.
user_flows: POST /analyze with { pasted_text: "<marathi text>" } -> Receive 200 with result { id, source_marathi, canonical_english, glossary_hits }
POST /analyze with {} (empty payload) -> Receive 400 with validation error 'missing_text' indicating user must provide PDF or pasted text

features.name: Optional localized outputs
features.description: Request additional localized outputs (selected Indian locales) for an existing result without altering the canonical English content.
user_flows: POST /enrich with { result_id: "<id>", target_locales: ["hi-IN","bn-IN"] } -> Receive 200 with enriched result containing localized_translations keyed by locale while canonical_english remains unchanged
POST /enrich with { result_id: "<id>", target_locales: [] } -> Receive 422 with validation error 'no_target_locales' when user fails to select any target language

features.name: Plain explanation and action items
features.description: Append a plain-language explanation and extracted key actions to an existing result via the enrich endpoint, preserving existing translations.
user_flows: POST /enrich with { result_id: "<id>", actions: true, explanation: true } -> Receive 200 with enriched result containing 'plain_explanation' and 'key_actions' appended to the existing result
POST /enrich with { result_id: "nonexistent", explanation: true } -> Receive 404 with error 'result_not_found' when the specified result_id does not exist

features.name: Glossary and quality details
features.description: Expose glossary readiness, active Lingo setup, and quality metadata; allow running baseline comparisons for operators and demo verification.
user_flows: GET /glossary-status -> Receive 200 with { glossary_package, d1_ready, last_sync_at, remote_term_count }
GET /lingo-setup -> Receive 200 with { engine_id, api_key_status, target_locales }
POST /quality/baseline-compare with { result_id: "<id>", baseline_id: "<baseline>" } -> Receive 200 with { comparison_report, diffs }
POST /quality/baseline-compare with { result_id: "<id>" } -> Receive 400 with validation error 'missing_baseline_id' when baseline parameter is omitted

routes.description: Landing page with live sample, PDF sample, PDF upload, and pasted Marathi text analysis entry points.
Result page showing original Marathi, canonical English, glossary context, Lingo provenance, and optional outputs.
Expanded result context page with setup, glossary, quality, and baseline comparison details.
Hidden read-only glossary status page for demo and operator verification.

features.name: Live sample analysis
features.description: User runs a curated Marathi sample through the live Cloudflare and Lingo-backed analysis flow.
user_interactions: Click Try live sample.
Wait for the analysis overlay to finish.
View Source text and Canonical translation on the result page.
Inspect glossary and Lingo provenance context.

features.name: PDF sample and upload analysis
features.description: User analyzes a built-in PDF sample or an uploaded PDF after browser-side PDF preparation.
user_interactions: Click Use sample PDF or select a PDF from the file input.
Click Analyze your document.
Wait for browser-side preparation and analysis.
View Source text and Canonical translation.
See validation if the selected file is not a PDF.

features.name: Pasted Marathi text analysis
features.description: User pastes Marathi source text and runs analysis without a PDF.
user_interactions: Paste Marathi text into the text area.
Click Analyze your document.
View side-by-side Marathi and canonical English results.
See validation if no PDF or text is provided.

features.name: Optional localized outputs
features.description: User selects Indian target languages and appends localized outputs without losing the canonical English result.
user_interactions: Open the target language selector.
Select one or more target languages.
Click Generate translation.
Confirm localized outputs appear while canonical English remains visible.
See validation if no target language is selected.

features.name: Plain explanation and action items
features.description: User appends plain-language explanation and key action outputs to an existing result.
user_interactions: Click Generate plain explanation.
Click Generate key actions.
Confirm outputs append without replacing existing translations or canonical English.

features.name: Glossary and quality details
features.description: User opens expanded details and hidden glossary status to inspect setup, glossary, quality, and baseline comparison information.
user_interactions: Open the expanded details page from the result page.
Review engine configuration and glossary state.
Run baseline comparison.
Navigate to the hidden glossary status page and return home.

known_limitations.issue: The official hackathon run must target live Cloudflare URLs because old local TestSprite runs are pre-hackathon history.
known_limitations.impact: Old artifacts should not be presented as official hackathon evidence.

known_limitations.issue: Browser-side PDF preparation can vary with large scanned files.
known_limitations.impact: Test coverage should use the built-in same-origin sample PDF for deterministic automation and separate larger scanned-file checks if needed.
